content: Curiosity-driven active learning agents can leverage a unified episodic-semantic graph to turn granular, serendipitous interaction logs into reusable abstract knowledge that dynamically updates to prioritize high-curiosity exploration targets, resolving the common tension between retaining specific exploration experiences and generalizing actionable insights about unknown domains. This framework naturally encodes curiosity as edge weights that grow when connecting disparate episodic and semantic nodes, turning unexpected discovery into structured memory growth.
